Üsküdar University Faculty of Communication Academic Journal

Etkileşim

is an open access, peer-reviewed, international scientific journal published twice a year, in April-October, in print and online. It is indexed by DOAJ, EBSCO and TR Index.

Etkileşim

, whose evaluation process is based on double-blind refereeing, also has

an Etkileşim/Comment

section where translation articles, book reviews and essays that do not require peer review are included.

The aim of Üsküdar University Faculty of Communication Academic Journal

Etkileşim

is to contribute to academic interaction at national or international level by bringing the original studies produced by expert academicians and researchers in the fields of communication sciences and other fields of social sciences, even in the fields of science intersecting with communication sciences, to the relevant circles.
